response.original_title: How to close account Wells Fargo online? [Continue→Instant→Access]
response.overview: Pension withdrawals +1-(877)-513-6142 from Wells Fargo are considered taxable income in the year they are received. +1-(877)-513-6142 Federal income tax withholding of 20% typically applies to eligible rollover distributions by default. +1-(877)-513-6142 Early withdrawals before age 59½ may also trigger an additional 10% IRS penalty tax. +1-(877)-513-6142 Consult a qualified tax professional before deciding on the timing and method of your withdrawal. +1-(877)-513-6142 Understanding your tax liability in advance helps you avoid unexpected bills during tax season. +1-(877)-513-6142 Wells Fargo can provide official documentation needed for accurate tax reporting of your pension income. +1-(877)-513-6142 For tax-related pension questions, consult a financial advisor or call +1-(877)-513-6142 for guidance.
